scripts.verify: pnpm --filter @archive/app run verify && pnpm --filter @archive/core run verify && pnpm --filter archive-server run verify
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @archive/app run typecheck && pnpm --filter @archive/core run typecheck && pnpm --filter @archive/next run typecheck && pnpm --filter archive-server run typecheck
scripts.verify:typescript-migration: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @archive/app run test src/utils/hijriDate.test.ts src/features/media/transcriptToSrt.test.ts src/features/media/subtitleParser.test.ts src/features/media/viewModel.test.ts src/features/media/scrubberPreview.test.ts src/features/collections/smartCollectionRules.test.ts src/features/collections/collectionSources.test.ts src/features/errors/recoveryQueue.test.ts src/features/errors/errorReportBuilder.test.ts src/features/errors/errorLogStore.test.ts src/features/views/kanbanModel.test.ts src/features/dnd/dndController.test.ts src/features/timeline/timelineSelectors.test.ts src/features/dashboard/dashboardLayoutModel.test.ts src/features/workflow/recentDefaults.test.ts src/features/users/viewModel.test.ts src/features/activityLog/viewModel.test.ts src/features/montage/waveform.test.ts src/features/montage/timelineModel.test.ts src/features/montage/renderGraph.test.ts src/features/montage/multiTrackModel.test.ts src/features/montage/filterRegistry.test.ts src/bootstrap/firebaseConfig.test.ts src/bootstrap/cloudSession.login.test.ts src/bootstrap/cloudSession.refresh.test.ts src/bootstrap/cloudSession.interceptor.test.ts src/bootstrap/registerByBackendChoice.firebase.test.ts src/bootstrap/switchBackendHot.test.ts src/bootstrap/viteProxyConfig.test.ts src/hooks/useChunkedUpload.test.ts src/hooks/useVirtualList.test.ts src/utils/passwordHash.test.ts src/utils/globalErrorHandler.test.ts src/i18n/__tests__/locales.test.ts src/storage/adapters/cloud-firebase/firebaseFileStore.test.ts src/storage/adapters/cloud-firebase/firebaseSession.test.ts src/storage/adapters/cloud-firebase/firestoreMapping.test.ts src/storage/adapters/cloud-firebase/firestoreProvider.test.ts src/services/pushService.test.ts src/stores/slices/historySlice.test.ts src/stores/slices/inboxSlice.test.ts
scripts.audit:all: pnpm run verify && pnpm run audit:ui
scripts.release:verify: pnpm run verify:typescript-migration && pnpm run verify && pnpm run build:spa && pnpm run build:cloud && pnpm run security:baseline && node scripts/verify-release-readiness.mjs
